name: HWR_CONTACT_INFO_B
description: The contact info table stores profile contact info data.

columns.Name: CONTACT_INFO_ID
columns.Comments: This is the primary key for the contact info table.

columns.Name: SOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: The Id of the source for the profile which has the contact info.

columns.Name: CONTACT_INFO_REPO
columns.Comments: The unique Id for writing to repo.

columns.Name: ADDRESS
columns.Comments: The street address of the person.

columns.Name: EMAIL
columns.Comments: The email address of the person.

columns.Name: HASHING_TYPE
columns.Comments: The hashing type of the contact info.

columns.Name: ONLINE_ACCOUNT
columns.Comments: The online account of the person.

columns.Name: ONLINE_ACCT_HOMEPAGE
columns.Comments: The URL for the online account homepage of the person.

columns.Name: PHONE
columns.Comments: The primary phone number of the person.

columns.Name: URL
columns.Comments: The URL of the person's homepage.

columns.Name: LATITUDE
columns.Comments: This is the geographical latitude of the person.

columns.Name: LONGITUDE
columns.Comments: This is the geographical longitude of the person.

columns.Name: ADDRESS_LINE_1
columns.Comments: This is the first line of the address for this person.

columns.Name: ADDRESS_LINE_2
columns.Comments: This is the second line of the address for this person.

columns.Name: ADDRESS_LINE_3
columns.Comments: This is the third line of the address for this person.

columns.Name: ADDRESS_LINE_4
columns.Comments: This is the fourth line of the address for this person.

columns.Name: BUILDING
columns.Comments: This is the building part of the address.

columns.Name: FLOOR_NUMBER
columns.Comments: This is the floor number part of the address.

columns.Name: TOWN_OR_CITY
columns.Comments: This is the town or city part of the address.

columns.Name: REGION_1
columns.Comments: This is the first region part of the address (most specific).

columns.Name: REGION_2
columns.Comments: This is the second region part of the address.

columns.Name: REGION_3
columns.Comments: This is the third region part of the address (least specific).

columns.Name: COUNTRY
columns.Comments: This is the country or 2-letter ISO country code part of the address.

columns.Name: POSTAL_CODE
columns.Comments: This is the postal code part of the address.

columns.Name: LONG_POSTAL_CODE
columns.Comments: This is the long postal code part of the address.

columns.Name: TIMEZONE_CODE
columns.Comments: This is the timezone code of the address.

columns.Name: DERIVED_LOCALE
columns.Comments: This is the derived locale composed of other address fields based on local standards.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
